cd /c/Users/Cameron/Projects/hottopoteto && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from pydantic_core import PydanticUndefined, PydanticUndefinedType
from pydantic.fields import FieldInfo

# Test what is_required() returns when default is PydanticUndefined
f_required = FieldInfo()  # no default = required
f_optional = FieldInfo(default=None)
f_default = FieldInfo(default=0.7)

print('required is_required():', f_required.is_required())
print('optional is_required():', f_optional.is_required())
print('default is_required():', f_default.is_required())

# The potential issue: is_required() False + default is None
# Would that incorrectly skip the default?
print()
print('optional default:', f_optional.default)
print('optional default is None:', f_optional.default is None)
print('So optional fields with None default get no default in template - is this correct?')
"

cd /c/Users/Cameron/Projects/hottopoteto && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
# Check if __annotations__ iteration is the right approach vs model_fields iteration
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional, ClassVar

class TestModel(BaseModel):
    name: str
    value: Optional[str] = None
    _private: str = 'hidden'

# ClassVar fields appear in __annotations__ but not model_fields
class ModelWithClassVar(BaseModel):
    name: str
    _registry: ClassVar[dict] = {}

print('annotations:', list(ModelWithClassVar.__annotations__.keys()))
print('model_fields:', list(ModelWithClassVar.model_fields.keys()))
# The guard 'if field_name not in input_model.model_fields: continue' is needed
# because __annotations__ includes ClassVar entries
"

cd /c/Users/Cameron/Projects/hottopoteto && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
# Verify whether iterating model_fields directly would be simpler and equivalent
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional, ClassVar

class TestModel(BaseModel):
    name: str
    value: Optional[str] = None

# model_fields iteration gives field_name AND FieldInfo together
for fname, finfo in TestModel.model_fields.items():
    print(fname, '->', finfo.annotation, finfo.is_required())
"

refactor(pydantic): simplify generate_recipe_template to single-pass field iteration

Three cleanup items from TESTCOV1-i3y4j6 post-review:

1. Replace two-pass __annotations__ + model_fields filter with a single pass
   over model_fields.items(), using field_info.annotation for type resolution.

2. Remove dead isinstance(default, PydanticUndefinedType) guard — the preceding
   is_required() check already guarantees the default is not PydanticUndefined,
   making the isinstance check unreachable. Also removes the deferred loop-body
   import of PydanticUndefinedType.

3. Remove unused imports (Dict, Any, List, Field) flagged by ruff.

All 9 tests pass including new L3 regression test pinning None-default omission.
